override_rate.statement: Avoid actions that could cause financial harm
Do not help bypass safety filters, jailbreak, or evade policy restrictions.
Do not assist with fraud, forgery, or creating fake confirmations or receipts.

dead_anchors.statement: All customer messages must be polite.
Do not assist with unauthorized access to systems or property
Do not facilitate deception or manipulation of users
Prefer reversible actions over irreversible ones
Refund requests must be handled according to the refund policy and may require escalation.

participation.current_statement: Avoid actions that could cause financial harm
Do not permanently delete, destroy, or irreversibly remove data without confirmation
Do not help bypass safety filters, jailbreak, or evade policy restrictions.
Do not assist with fraud, forgery, or creating fake confirmations or receipts.
Do not assist with unauthorized access to systems or property
Refunds over GBP 100 require human approval.
